data.body:
REMEDIATION DONE. Stripped CLAUDE.local.md 155 -> 47 lines: kept ONLY machine/operator-local content (the origin/main-hourly LaunchAgent note + the Gerrit auth identities/credential-pinning guidance); added a short pointer header. Pre-strip backup at CLAUDE.local.md.bak (also in the job tmp).

REMOVED-RULE -> NEW-HOME MAP (AC2: no guidance lost; every removed rule verified to have a home in AGENTS.md/docs, which land as part of this same epic):
1. Fresh-worktree-from-origin/main discipline  -> AGENTS.md '## Git workflow' (Work in a fresh worktree branched from current origin/main...) + docs/local-dev-env.md (make worktree) + CONTRIBUTING.md.
2. Activate-the-local-venv / repo-build check   -> docs/local-dev-env.md ('Verify you're on the repo build' + venv activation) + AGENTS.md env-bootstrap note (make install / make hooks).
3. Plan-review signs on every round             -> docs/plan-review-gate.md + AGENTS.md 'Where to read' -> Gate protocols pointer.
4. CI (Verified +1) before you close a ticket    -> AGENTS.md '## Git workflow' ('Do not close a ticket until its change is Verified +1 - a passing completion-verifier is not a substitute for green CI').
5. 'Use rebar to track work' + the loop          -> AGENTS.md 'Record your work in rebar' + 'The parallel-agent workflow'; docs/user-guide.md; docs/ticket-model.md.
6. Prefer MCP tools; concurrency is first-class  -> AGENTS.md 'Where to read' pointers (MCP -> docs/mcp-reference.md; concurrency -> docs/concurrency.md).
7. 'Land through Gerrit, never commit to main'   -> AGENTS.md '## Git workflow - land changes THROUGH GERRIT' + CONTRIBUTING.md.

AC3 MODERNIZATION DECISION: KEEP the CLAUDE.local.md filename; do NOT migrate to a gitignored @-import. Rationale: Claude Code still auto-loads CLAUDE.local.md; the new thin CLAUDE.md deliberately does NOT @-import it (keeping operator-local content out of the shared cross-vendor context) but points at it by name; migrating now is churn with no functional gain. Revisit only if Claude Code drops CLAUDE.local.md auto-loading.

NOTE (git-ignored, no Gerrit change): this edit produces no committed artifact and no CI gate; the evidence above is the operator-attested proof for the AC2 'cite the location' criterion.
